fields.title: Replace manual validation in agent/parser.ts with Schema
fields.description: parseAgentDefinition() in agent/parser.ts does 14 manual typeof checks with throws to validate YAML frontmatter fields (name, description, models, sandbox_fs, sandbox_net, approval_policy, approval_timeout). This is ~80 lines of fragile hand-rolled validation that duplicates what Schema.decodeUnknownSync does declaratively. Error messages are inconsistent and the validation logic is hard to extend when new fields are added.
fields.design: Define an AgentDefinitionFrontmatter Schema that validates the YAML-parsed object. Use Schema.decodeUnknownSync to replace the manual checks. The function stays synchronous. Keep the YAML parsing and regex for frontmatter extraction as-is - only replace the validation of the parsed object. The Schema also serves as the canonical type definition for the frontmatter shape. parseModelSpec gets its own sub-schema.
fields.acceptance_criteria: parseAgentDefinition uses Schema.decodeUnknownSync for frontmatter validation. No manual typeof+throw chains remain for field validation. Invalid definitions produce ParseError with field-level details. Existing tests and agent loading continue to work. npm run gate passes.
fields.notes: Replaced parser frontmatter/model validation with Effect Schema.decodeUnknownSync; parse errors now include field paths. Updated agent-parser tests to assert ParseError paths. npm run test passes; npm run gate currently blocked by pre-existing typecheck errors in extensions/tau/src/status/index.ts (TS2322 at lines 115, 122, 147, 161).
